channel.title: Windows on cha0s.re
channel.description: Recent content in Windows on cha0s.re

item.title: Reading a PE section table without tools
item.description: Section headers are 40 bytes each and sit immediately after the optional header. That is the whole trick.

item.title: TLS callbacks run before you do
item.description: A short note on the oldest trick in the packer handbook, and why your breakpoint on the entry point never hit.

item.title: Hooking the Windows loader
item.description: Walking LDR_DATA_TABLE_ENTRY by hand, then patching the one function that everybody hooks and nobody documents.
